calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Trust Litigation And Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz and Marilyn Young for Julie Abrahamsen. Lee Kaster for Paul Girard.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that waivers of notice from all of the Beneficiaries have been filed and addressed the issue of distribution of the remaining 3% residuary interest. The Court granted the Petition for Order Approving Settlement of Trust Litigation and Approving Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order). The Petition for Order Confirming Paul Girard's Status as Trust Beneficiary, etc. was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Order Confirming Paul Girard'S Status As Trust Beneficiary; Breach Of Fiduciary Duties; Elder Financial Abuse; And Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Paul Girard'S Status As Trust Beneficiary; Breach Of Fiduciary Duties; Elder Financial Abuse; And Removal Of Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Continued To Sep-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Construction Of Trust Instrument, And To Determine To Whom Property Shall Pass Upon Termination Of The Trust
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Julie Abrahamsen (Petitioner). Claudia Lowder for California Missions Foundation. Lee Kaster for Paul Girard (Beneficiary).

The Court stated that the tentative is that the writing is that the personal property and the car go to Ms. Abrahamsen, and that the properties are to be distributed as the residue. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
